name: PACCAR
analysis: PCAR has reclaimed its short-term moving averages — the 9 has crossed up through the 26 and price is back above both. It is coming off a base, 9% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Trade idea: entry $119.2450, stop $112.8006, target $138.5782 (3.00:1) — then trail it.
